page_content:
DANC611 Dance Technology and Media (1 Credit)

Project-based development of media and technological support for

dance performance, archiving, and portfolio design, development and implementation.

Restriction: Permission of ARHU-School of Theatre, Dance & Performance Studies department.

DANC628 Graduate Ballet (1 Credit)

Execution of the vocabulary of ballet movement with technical accuracy. Restriction: Permission of ARHU-School of Theatre, Dance & Performance Studies department.
